13

Fernandina Beach - Salt Life Food Shack

Fun atmosphere, gift shop inside. Two stories, offering ocean views. A little pricey but worth every penny. The food and drinks are wonderful.

Sliders Seaside Grill

Such a fun place to eat while your toes hit the sand. Live music, a playground for kids, full bar and fresh seafood.

The Surf Restaurant & Bar - Fernandina Beach

Another great stop for fresh seafood. They offer other dishes as well, like a yummy Nashville Chicken Sandwich that will blow your mind. Offering outdoor dining on a brand new, updated deck. Listen to the ocean, as you're just across the street.

Lindsay Tuttle

12

Hostels In Munich From €14 - Top Rated Hostels 2023

I am a huge advocate of hostels. They are not only for the younger people. You can find hostels that offer rooms for 1 or 2 people or you can share a room with a large group. I preferred large group as a lone travel to meet other like minded people. Take a chance and stay at one, they are fun and Hostelworld is the best app around in finding the best fit hostel for you.

THE ORIGINAL COLD WAR EAST BERLIN COMMUNISM & BERLIN WALL TOUR

The Berlin Wall is a must see and getting on a tour will give you all the history you know and maybe some you do not know.

THE 5 BEST Munich 5 Star Hotels 2023 (with Prices)

If you are not down with staying at a hostel and want the finer sleeping conditions, there are plenty of beautiful 5 star hotels located in Munich over looking the city and the most coveted adventure Oktoberfest.

Visit Germany

There is not one bad thing I can say about Germany. The culture, food, and beer is amazing. It also a great place to learn about history. History is important to know.

Guide to Spain & Morocco (Sevilla, Tangier, Ronda, Cordoba and Malaga) What to do and places to eat!

Want to plan a 1-week trip to the South of Spain and maybe sprinkle a day in Morocco? I got you! Here will find a self-guided itinerary that will include Sevilla, Ronda, Cordoba, Malaga and a day trip to Tanger, Morocco) You will get a chance to explore the culture scene while driving to different parts of Spain and trying some delicious food. We stayed in Malaga/Marbella which was a centralized location to the other areas of Spain mentioned above. It was very easy to move around. I hope this is helpful!

View List
My Favorite Things to do in and around Woodstock GA

I always put lots of time into researching places online or getting recommendations from friends. Here is the list of places I put together for the Woodstock GA area and around!

Gamer's Tree House

11

Pastel Kawaii

Prepare to be dazzled by this pastel kawaii gaming setup from @shryma! This cozy corner has everything you need for gaming and working from home: a floating desk, a pro gaming chair, and a Gojo pillow. But the real star of the show is the custom-made Kirby neon sign that brightens up the whole space. Who can resist the charm of the pink puffball? He’s simply adorable!

Green Nature Setup

You’ll be mesmerized by this aesthetic gaming setup that radiates a cozy and relaxing vibe. Instagrammer @sleepily_gaming has skillfully blended faux vines and fairy string lights to create a contrast with the sleek PC gear and furniture, and the result is magical! We just love the Mario mushroom pillow? It adds a touch of nostalgia and cuteness to the whole scene!

Car Enthusiasts

Check out this cool and classy space that belongs to an automotive engineer who loves to game and work in style. We adore how the wooden desktop and white storage drawers add some warmth and contrast to the black accent wall! This gaming station is a perfect example of how you can express your passions and interests through your décor choices.

See all 11 recs

View List
Gaming Setup Ideas

If you are looking for some inspiration to spice up your gaming area, you might want to consider some of the themes that can make your space more fun and personalized. A theme can help you create a cohesive and attractive look for your gaming setup, as well as reflect your interests and preferences. Here are some of the themes that you can try for your gaming area, and how they can also be practical for a home office.

510 Families

29

Marketplace - Berkeley Parents Network

Berkeley Parents Network Marketplace (Berkeley and vicinity) is a moderated email newsletter of baby- and kid-related items up for grabs at usually good prices (Must subscribe to participate).

NHTSA

AAA will check your car seat installation for free or point you to a fire station near you that will do it. Click here (https://www.nhtsa.gov/campaign/safercargov?redirect-safercar-sitewide&q_State=&q_Zip=94608) to see the list of places to get car seat inspections and the phone numbers to make an appointment.

Classes – BirthWays

Birthways (Berkeley) is a non-profit that brings Childbirth Prep, Breastfeeding, Home Birth 101, and Meet the Doula nights to East Bay expectant parents. Browse their newborn classes here

See all 29 recs

View List
Birth and Baby Resources

Thanks to East Bay Music Together for sponsoring this guide to resources for new parents and babies in the East Bay. East Bay Music Together has a new online class for parents and caretakers of young babies. Babies are positioned so they can watch and interact with their special grown-up, and the grown-up follows the teacher on the screen. 510families.com/birth-and-baby-guide-for-east-bay-expectant-parents

Carson Pack

85

Omega Water Cream Moisturizer

This is a great lightweight water-based gel moisturizer. It’s suitable for all skin types and the perfect base to start with in your makeup routine! It also gets the “clean beauty” stamp of approval from Sephora which is a major plus! Price: $10.99

Yummy Skin Soothing Serum Skin Tint Foundation with Peptides + Ceramides

Unlike any other skin tint out there! This is infused with many beneficial skincare ingredients and leaves you with a light coverage, skin like, hydrated finish. I recommend this product mostly to anyone with dry to combo skin! It won’t have much staying power for those that lean towards the “oily” spectrum. Price: $36.00

Bare With Me Hydrating Face & Body Concealer Serum - NYX Professional Makeup | Ulta Beauty

Amazing concealer that covers, isn't heavy and provides hydration! The packaging is a pump instead of a doe foot applicator- which is a major deal for me. I would reccomend this to beginner and experienced makeup wearers! My favourite way to apply this concealer is tapping it in with my fingers so it keeps the coverage and doesn't sheer out with a sponge or brush. Price: $12.00
